title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Something bleak about watching this govt just lamely fizzle out. Unable to take decisions; waiting for Burnham but not convinced he’s got it; PM not even really using the ‘sod it, what have I got to lose’ freedom you ...
